title: [v4.7] Do not add powercap mask if no paths are masked
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #20510

/assign mheon

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *giuseppe*, *openshift-cherrypick-robot* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v4.7/OWNERS)~~ [giuseppe] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@cevich any idea whatsup with the yaml error in validate? failed on rerun

I've seen this on a few PRs now.  I have no idea why it's *only* failing on this branch, and *only* failing for ARM64.  Probably the version of pre-commit is too old.  I'll toss a PR to bump it up on this branch to see what happens.
@cevich Any new ideas on this one?

Unf. no, I gave up scratching my head after forming a new bald-spot.  I don't understand why it only fails on this branch, and only for ARM64.  Must be something arch-specific and incompatible in the CI VM image.  So I think the check should simply be bypassed for non-x86 on this branch.
